name: Pecan Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 15-ounce custard cup, melt the butter or margarine on 100% power for 30 to 40 seconds.
2. Swirl the melted butter in the custard cup, coating sides and bottom.
3. Pour the excess butter from the custard cup into the beaten egg.
4. Stir in the dark corn syrup and vanilla extract.
5. Mix together flour and baking powder.
6. Add the flour mixture to the egg mixture.
7. Gently fold in the chopped pecans.
8. Pour the pecan mixture into the buttered custard cup.
9. Cook on 50% power for 3 to 4 minutes, rotating the custard cup a half-turn every minute.
10. Sift powdered sugar over the top.
11. Serve warm with light cream, if desired.
